targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, machine_id AS metric, temperature_c AS value FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temperature_c IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, machine_id

panels.title: Vitesse moyenne des ventilateurs par machine (RPM)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, machine_id AS metric, fan_rpm_avg AS value FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND fan_rpm_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts, machine_id
SELECT ts AS time, 'cluster' AS metric, SUM(power_w) AS value FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND power_w IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (machine_id) machine_id, status FROM telemetry ORDER BY machine_id, ts DESC) SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'on') AS "ON (allumées)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'degraded') AS "DEGRADED (dégradées)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'off') AS "OFF (éteintes)" FROM latest

WITH all_types(fault_type) AS (VALUES ('extinction par surchauffe'), ('dégradé par surchauffe'), ('fan_failure'), ('power_surge'), ('sensor_drift'), ('thermal_runaway'), ('network_glitch')), counts AS (SELECT payload->>'type' AS fault_type, COUNT(*) AS nb FROM events WHERE event_type = 'fault' AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND payload->>'type' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payload->>'type' UNION ALL SELECT 'extinction par surchauffe', COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_type = 'status_change' AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND COALESCE(cause, payload->>'cause') = 'overheat' UNION ALL SELECT 'dégradé par surchauffe', COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_type = 'status_change' AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND COALESCE(cause, payload->>'cause') = 'overheat_partial') SELECT t.fault_type AS "Type de panne", COALESCE(SUM(c.nb), 0) AS "Nombre" FROM all_types t LEFT JOIN counts c ON c.fault_type = t.fault_type GROUP BY t.fault_type ORDER BY "Nombre" DESC

SELECT ts AS "Horodatage", machine_id AS "Machine", payload->>'type' AS "Type", '⚙️ panne matérielle' AS "Catégorie" FROM events WHERE event_type = 'fault' AND $__timeFilter(ts) UNION ALL SELECT ts, machine_id, 'extinction par surchauffe', '🌡️ thermique' FROM events WHERE event_type = 'status_change' AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND COALESCE(cause, payload->>'cause') = 'overheat' UNION ALL SELECT ts, machine_id, 'dégradé par surchauffe', '🌡️ thermique' FROM events WHERE event_type = 'status_change' AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND COALESCE(cause, payload->>'cause') = 'overheat_partial' ORDER BY "Horodatage" DESC LIMIT 30
